## Type Of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test coverage
- [ ] UI/reporting
- [ ] Data-source handling

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] Does not claim AS/NZS compliance.
- [ ] Does not add certified design values.
- [ ] Does not include private project, client, claim, or property-owner data.
- [ ] Documents limitations or reviewer assumptions where relevant.

## Verification

- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `node --check src/openwind_au/static/app.js` if frontend JavaScript changed

## Notes For Reviewers

Describe any data-source assumptions, screenshots, or manual checks that reviewers should inspect.
